description: Tiny normalized ConvoMem fixture with real conversations and evidence messages.

items.query: What color do I use for hot leads?

message_evidences.speaker: User
message_evidences.text: I use green for hot leads in my spreadsheet.

messages.speaker: User
messages.text: I use green for hot leads in my spreadsheet.

messages.speaker: Assistant
messages.text: Green makes the priority stand out.

items.query: Which city did I say the handoff should go to?

message_evidences.speaker: Assistant
message_evidences.text: You said the handoff should go to Boston.

messages.speaker: User
messages.text: Please send the packet to Boston tomorrow.

messages.speaker: Assistant
messages.text: You said the handoff should go to Boston.
